title: Shifting Attention to Relevance: A Token- and Sentence-Level Attention-Shifting Method for Uncertainty Quantification in Large Language Models

defines.name: SAR
defines.definition: Shifting Attention to Relevance (SAR) is an uncertainty quantification method that reassigns attention to more relevant tokens and sentences when estimating uncertainty in LLM generations.

problem: Existing uncertainty quantification methods for LLMs treat all generated tokens and sentences too equally, causing irrelevant components to be over-weighted and leading to inaccurate uncertainty estimates.
